texts.content_text100: The aim of this module is to support the strengthening collaboration between those who are working on child protection victim support services and different cases in in a very integrated and holistic approach. This would require a clear understanding of why this cooperation is so important and this would be supported also by the integrated child protection strategy of the European Union that is clearly indicating the need for this kind of collaboration. It also means that those professionals in the different areas uh have to learn each other's language. They have to decide what kind of definitions to be used together. That would be supported by joint trainings and clear roles, responsibilities, accountabilities in the different cases and procedures.
texts.content_text101: The entire exercise has to be based on the UNCRC taking into consideration the best interest of the child listening to children uh involving them as active participants and also taking the the family members parents um um role uh essential during the process. There are different actors who have to work together because no one single actor is able uh to look at these issues holistically and support the child victims of in child protection cases.
texts.content_text102: Uh the main characters are the health professionals, education, schools, school counselors and others um working in in the schools the law enforcement people also the courts and other legal professionals and institutions. These actions and practices can be based on the charter and the justice system that has been backed up both by the council of Europe and the European Union.
texts.content_text103: Both of them are based on the UNCRC and they are child- centered and child focused based on the the widest possible child rights based approach. When it comes to the language used, it is important not only utilizing the opportunities to work together and learn each other's uh way of uh expressing uh the views and using definitions but also making it as user friendly as possible so that the children and the families members can also understand and follow uh the procedure and take an active part while they are treated with respect and their dignity is taken into consideration. For that purpose, the best method could be the use of barnahus uh model and other techniques that can support and protect the children uh who are victims of child protection cases where they need to be protected while also listened to. I hope that this uh module will help all the professionals to learn how to work together, how to work together with the victims and
texts.content_text104: those witnesses who have been part also the cases and also it can also contribute to better understanding um of each other and learning from each other while um using a holistic and very much integrated support system to resolve these cases.
